original: Manufactured by the kaithrit military, for the kaithrit military, this standard-issue sidearm is infamous for its durability and is jokingly known as a “Nine Lives Pistol”. Stories about handguns being recovered from the sites of orbital bombardments - while still functional - are commonplace. This particular firearm has grown a fine patina of rust, yet its mechanisms still move as if freshly oiled. Nice.
